ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot carefully handling a card file box.  The movement will be deliberate and precise, reflecting the careful handling required for such an item.  The robot will start with arms at its sides, then reach out to grasp the box, lift it, and finally, place it down gently.  The left arm will be primarily used for support and stability. The right arm will do the primary lifting.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready for the file box
arms reach out, left supporting, right lifting
right arm lifts the box, left steady
box is gently placed down, arms return
both arms settle back to rest
